sections.paragraph:
παραχρῆμα adv. (Hdt., Thu., Aristoph.+. On the spelling s. B-D-F §12, 3; Rob. 297; on its use §102, 2; Rob. 550) pert. to a point of time that is immediately subsequent to an action, at once, immediately Mt 21:19f. Elsewh. in the NT only in Lk and Ac: Lk 1:64; 4:39; 5:25; 8:44, 47, 55; 13:13; 18:43; 19:11; 22:60; Ac 3:7; 5:10; 12:23; 13:11; 16:26, 33; 22:29 v.l.—B 12:7; MPol 13:1; GJs 19:2; 20:4 codd.; 22:3. Pleonastically εὐθέως παραχρῆμα (X. et al.; PStras 35, 17 εὐθὺς καὶ παραχρῆμα) Ac 14:10 D (B-D-F §484; cp. Rob. 1205).—DDaube, The Sudden in Scripture ’64, 38–46 (but s. Rydbeck 174–76). S. εὐθέως.—DELG s.v. χρῆμα. M-M.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

NT NT = New Testament

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PStras PStras = Griechische Papyrus der kaiserlichen Universitäts- und Landesbibliothek zu Strassburg—List 4

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Rydbeck Rydbeck = LR., Fachprosa, vermeintliche Volkssprache und Neues Testament—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 773
